# opnsense_quagga_route_map (Resource)

Manages a BGP route map entry on OPNsense via the FRR/Quagga plugin. Requires `os-frr`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "opnsense_quagga_route_map" "set_localpref" {
  name   = "set-localpref"
  action = "permit"
  order  = 10
  set    = "local-preference 200"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `action` (String) Action: `permit` or `deny`.
- `name` (String) Route map name.
- `order` (Number) Route map sequence number (1-65535).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this route map entry is enabled.
- `match_prefix` (Set of String) Set of prefix list UUIDs to match against.
- `set` (String) Set actions (e.g., `local-preference 200`).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID.

## Import

```shell
terraform import opnsense_quagga_route_map.example 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
